title: Create: Extended Flywheels
description: A small mod to add on to Create by adding numerous new flywheels and bringing them new functionality
body:
This mod is an addon to [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), it adds new variations of the flywheel from numerous materials that can be painted any colour you want, and to add on to this flywheels from the mod will now rotate on trains
 

Both Create **0.5.c** and **0.5.d** are fully supported by Create: Extended Flywheels, any files not specifically marked are for 0.5.d, files for 0.5.c have been labelled as such - if you have any confusion finding the right version just check the patch notes

 

With the release of v1.2, when updating any and all mods please, make sure to back up your worlds just in case

 

For more decorations for your trains check out Dave's Building Extended or Powderlogy & Illumination

 

**Materials**

![Iron Flywheels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rabbitminers/Extended-Flywheels/master/iron_flywheel_showcase.png)

Iron flywheels can be crafted just like default Create flywheels they could be used to look similar to Create's train bogeys but with more variety in colour and at a larger scale.

 ![Steel Flywheels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rabbitminers/Extended-Flywheels/master/steel_flywheel_showcase.png)

Dont worry there isn't yet another steel ingot implemented in this mod nor does it depend on any other mods that add steel. To make the mod as compatible with existing worlds as possible iron flywheels can be blasted to turn into steel flywheels, or if steel is in your modpack then they can be crafted like any other flywheel using steel ingots.

 ![Brass Flywheels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rabbitminers/Extended-Flywheels/master/brass_flywheel_showcase.png) 

Brass flywheels can be crafted either from a default create flywheel as a 1:1 exchange or as their own recipe. (Please Note - Default Create Flywheels do NOT rotate on trains, use the extended flywheels Brass Flywheel instead) 

 

**New in version 1.2**

 
 ![Wooden Flywheels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rabbitminers/Extended-Flywheels/master/fully_wooden_showcase.png)

 ![Plated Flywheels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rabbitminers/Extended-Flywheels/master/mostly_wooden_showcase.png)
 

**Examples**

 ![Stephenson's Rocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rabbitminers/Extended-Flywheels/master/rocket_example_direction_fixed.png)
 
 ![Red Train](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rabbitminers/Extended-Flywheels/master/red_train_example.png)
 


**Localization**

If would like to, any help with translation would be highly appreciated

note - some words may be slightly altered or blocks may be missing a name please report them to me so that they can be fixed :)

 

- en_us     English US       

- en_uk     English UK

- de_de     German                      Knalli65hd  

- no_no     Norwegian Bokmål     Svien         

- pl_pl        Polish                         Stacode      

- nl_nl        Dutch                         Mr. Snor 

- ru_ru       Russian                      TPEcool (to be implemented soon)

- cs_cz      Czech                         official_deadovnik (to be implemented soon)

- sk_sk      Slovak                        official_deadovnik (to be implemented soon)

 

If any issues occur or you find any bugs feel free to contact me on discord at Rabbitminers#0086 or report them on github at https://github.com/Rabbitminers/Extended-Flywheels/issues
